query:
SELECT r.id
           FROM rooms_fts
           JOIN rooms r ON r.rowid = rooms_fts.rowid
           WHERE rooms_fts.slug LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'
             AND r.merged_into IS NULL
             AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
           ORDER BY (LOWER(r.slug) = ?) DESC,
                    (LOWER(r.slug) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\') DESC,
                    LENGTH(r.slug),
                    r.slug
           LIMIT ?
